prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
This page contains the END of "Item 7A. Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures About Market Risk". The next section is "Item 8. Financial Statements and Supplementary Data".
Transcribe VERBATIM the last 5 lines of "Item 7A" body text before the next item begins:
if the "Item 8" heading appears on this page, take the 5 lines just before it; otherwise Item 7A continues to the bottom, so take the last 5 lines of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
The critical audit matter communicated below is a matter arising from the current period audit of the consolidated financial statements that was
communicated or required to be communicated to the audit committee and that: (1) relates to accounts or disclosures that are material to the
consolidated financial statements and (2) involved our especially challenging, subjective, or complex judgments. The communication of a critical
audit matter does not alter in any way our opinion on the consolidated financial statements, taken as a whole, and we are not, by communicating the
critical audit matter below, providing a separate opinion on the critical audit matter or on the accounts or disclosures to which it relates.
